channel.title: Networking on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Automation and Programmability
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Automation" , "Programmability" , "SDN" , "REST APIs" , "Cisco Certification" , "Infrastructure as Code" , "DevNet" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master automation and programmability for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn how automation impacts networks, controller-based architectures, REST APIs, configuration management, and JSON.

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): IP Connectivity and Routing
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Routing" , "OSPF" , "Static Routing" , "IP Connectivity" , "Cisco Certification" , "Routing and Switching" , "Network Architecture" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master IP connectivity for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn the routing table, forwarding decisions, IPv4 and IPv6 static routing, single-area OSPFv2, and first hop redundancy protocols.

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): IP Services
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "IP Services" , "NAT" , "DHCP" , "QoS" , "Cisco Certification" , "Network Operations" , "Network Management" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master IP services for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn NAT, NTP, DHCP and DNS roles, SNMP, syslog, QoS per-hop behavior, SSH, and TFTP/FTP.

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Network Access
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Switching" , "VLANs" , "Spanning Tree" , "Wireless" , "Cisco Certification" , "Network Access" , "EtherChannel" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master network access for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn VLANs, trunking, EtherChannel, Rapid PVST+ spanning tree, discovery protocols, and Cisco wireless architectures.

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Network Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Fundamentals" , "Switching" , "IP Addressing" , "Wireless" , "Cisco Certification" , "Routing and Switching" , "Network Architecture" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master network fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn network components, topologies, cabling, TCP and UDP, IPv4 and IPv6 addressing, wireless principles, and switching concepts.

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Security Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Security" , "Access Control Lists" , "VPN" , "Layer 2 Security" , "Cisco Certification" , "Wireless Security" , "AAA" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master security fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn security concepts, device access control, VPNs, access control lists, Layer 2 security, AAA, and wireless security.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Networking Fundamentals
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Networking" , "TCP/IP" , "Wireless Networking" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Network Hardware" , "SOHO Networks" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master networking for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn TCP and UDP ports, wireless technologies, networked host services, network hardware, SOHO configuration, and tools.

item.title: Boost Your Helium Mobile Hotspot: Mastering Range and Speed with External Antennas
item.category: "Technology" , "Networking" , "Wireless Connectivity" , "DIY Tech" , "Internet Solutions" , "Home Networking" , "WiFi Upgrades" , "Telecommunications" , "Wireless Technology" , "Smart Home"
item.description: Discover how to optimize your Helium Hotspot's range and speed using external antennas. Elevate your WiFi experience today!

item.title: Maximize Long-Distance Networking with Top Cabling Solutions
item.category: "Networking" , "Communication Technology" , "Data Cabling" , "Fiber Optics" , "Information Technology Infrastructure" , "Ethernet Networking" , "Telecommunications" , "Wireless Networking" , "Corporate IT Solutions" , "Network Engineering"
item.description: Discover the BEST Long-Distance Networking Cables to Elevate Communication. Perfect guide for IT professionals seeking robust solutions - Read Now!

item.title: Configuring Hotspot 2.0 / Passpoint 2.0 on OpenWRT
item.category: "Technology" , "Networking" , "Wireless Solutions" , "OpenWRT Configuration" , "Passpoint Setup" , "Cybersecurity" , "WiFi Standards" , "Router Enhancements" , "Internet Connectivity" , "Network Optimization"
item.description: Explore the step-by-step guide to create Hotspot 2.0 on OpenWRT, ensuring smooth connections and enhanced security. Dive into the future of Wi-Fi effortlessly.

item.title: Quadruple Mining DePin GPS Projects: Geodnet, Onocoy, RTKDirect, and FrysCrypto
item.category: "Technology" , "DIY" , "Navigation" , "GPS" , "Precision" , "Geolocation" , "Blockchain" , "Networking" , "Innovation" , "Global Connectivity"
item.description: Embark on a GPS revolution! Discover DIY triple mining with Geodnet, Onocoy, and RTKDirect for enhanced precision. Join a global network and save costs. Explore the future of navigation now!

item.title: Unlock Precision: Build Your DIY RTKDirect Reference Station Today!
item.category: "Technology" , "DIY" , "Navigation" , "GPS" , "Precision" , "Geolocation" , "Blockchain" , "Networking" , "Innovation" , "Global Connectivity"
item.description: Explore DIY RTKDirect setup for enhanced GPS precision. Save costs, customize, and join a global network. Ready to revolutionize your navigation?

item.title: Effortless Custom Ethernet Cable Creation Guide | DIY Network Solutions
item.category: "Technology" , "DIY" , "Networking" , "Cable Management" , "Internet" , "Network Infrastructure" , "Computer Accessories" , "Home Improvement" , "Electronics" , "Tech How-To"
item.description: Learn how to create custom Ethernet cables effortlessly and optimize your network setup for superior performance. DIY networking made easy!

item.title: Budget-Friendly 10g pfSense Build with HP t740 for Effortless Networking
item.category: "Networking" , "Cybersecurity" , "Hardware" , "DIY" , "Open-Source" , "Small Business" , "Home Network" , "Technology" , "IT Solutions" , "Network Security"
item.description: Discover how to effortlessly build a 10 gigabit capable pfSense router and firewall on a budget using the HP t740, ensuring high-performance networking for your needs.

item.title: Mastering Windows Networking: Boosting Connectivity and Collaboration

item.description: Unlock the power of Windows networking tools for smooth connections and efficient downloads.

item.title: Top Homelab Content Creators: Connect and Elevate Your Tech Journey

item.description: Discover influential homelab content creators, connect with fellow enthusiasts, and starting a journey of tech exploration.

item.description: Supercharge Ansible with Shodan API integration using specialized modules for enhanced automation.

item.title: How to Properly Place Access Points: Optimizing Wireless Connectivity for smooth Performance
item.category: "Technology" , "Networking" , "Wireless Networks" , "Access Points" , "Wi-Fi Installation" , "Network Optimization" , "Home Networking" , "Wireless Connectivity" , "Internet of Things" , "Networking Solutions"
item.description: Learn the best practices for placing access points to optimize wireless connectivity, minimize interference, and ensure smooth performance for your network.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Mastering Network Software Tools and Commands
item.category: "Networking" , "Network Tools" , "Command Line Utilities" , "Network Troubleshooting" , "CompTIA Network+ Certification" , "Network Management" , "Network Configuration" , "WiFi Analysis" , "Packet Capture" , "Bandwidth Testing"
item.description: Explore essential network software tools and command line utilities, learn their usage, and troubleshoot like a pro with this comprehensive Network+ Certification Exam course.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Troubleshooting Cable Connectivity Issues
item.category: "Networking" , "IT Certifications" , "Cable Troubleshooting" , "Network Connectivity" , "CompTIA Network Plus" , "IT Training" , "Troubleshooting Techniques" , "Networking Fundamentals" , "Cable Issues" , "IT Professionals"
item.description: Learn essential troubleshooting techniques for cable connectivity issues in this comprehensive guide for the CompTIA Network+ Certification Exam.

item.title: Networking Basics: What is an IP Address & IPv4 vs IPv6
item.category: "Networking" , "IP Addresses" , "Internet Protocols" , "IPv4" , "IPv6" , "Network Communication" , "Internet Connectivity" , "Technology" , "Network Infrastructure" , "Internet Security"
item.description: Discover the basics of IP addresses, including the difference between IPv4 and IPv6, their significance, and the importance of IPv6 adoption.

item.title: Networking Basics: Understanding Switches, Routers, Gateways, Subnets, Firewalls & DMZs
item.category: "Networking" , "IT Infrastructure" , "Network Security" , "Network Architecture" , "Cybersecurity" , "Data Communication" , "Information Technology" , "IT Fundamentals" , "Network Management" , "Internet Connectivity"
item.description: Discover the fundamentals of networking components and their significance in building reliable and secure networks, including switches, routers, gateways, subnets, firewalls, and DMZs.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Backup and Restore for Network Stability and Resilience
item.category: "IT Certification" , "Networking" , "Network Infrastructure" , "Backup and Restore" , "Disaster Recovery" , "High Availability" , "Data Protection" , "IT Resilience" , "Network Management" , "IT Operations"
item.description: Learn the importance of network device backup and restore, strategies for backing up and restoring device state and configuration, recovery sites, redundancy and high availability mechanisms, and essential metrics in network operations.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Exploring Wireless Standards and Technologies
item.category: "Technology" , "Networking" , "Wireless Networking" , "Certification Exam" , "CompTIA Network+" , "IT Training" , "IT Certification" , "Wireless Standards" , "Wireless Technologies" , "Information Technology"
item.description: Discover the different 802.11 standards, frequencies, range, and encryption in wireless networks to prepare for CompTIA's Network+ Certification Exam.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Address Resolution Protocol (ARP) and Neighbor Discovery Protocol (NDP)
item.category: "Technology" , "Networking" , "Protocols" , "Network+ Certification" , "Troubleshooting" , "Network Security" , "IPv4" , "IPv6" , "Network Communication" , "Address Resolution"
item.description: Learn how to effectively utilize Address Resolution Protocol (ARP) and Neighbor Discovery Protocol (NDP) to resolve IP addresses to MAC addresses, navigate IPv6 networks, and troubleshoot common issues for optimized network performance and security.
